topic: Spice rack jars are relabeled each morning with names instead of spices.
title: My Spice Jars Are Relabeled With Names Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The jars in my spice rack are relabeled each morning with names instead of spices.
scenes.image_prompt: a wooden spice rack of small jars in a dim kitchen, faint handwritten labels, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep them above my stove, alphabetized, just so.
scenes.image_prompt: a neat row of matching spice jars above a stove, dim warm light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
a hand placing a handwritten label on a small glass jar, soft light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the paprika jar read a woman's name instead.
scenes.image_prompt: a single spice jar with a handwritten name on its label, dim kitchen, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By the weekend, every jar bore a different name.
scenes.image_prompt: rows of spice jars each labeled with cursive names, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The handwriting was small and neat, and it was not mine.
scenes.image_prompt: a close framed jar label with delicate cursive writing, harsh angled light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I searched the names online, one by one.
scenes.image_prompt: a laptop glowing in a dark kitchen with a search page open, blue light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each one was a person who had once lived in this house.
scenes.image_prompt: old property documents spread on a kitchen table under a dim lamp, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every morning a new name appeared, and the jar behind it was empty.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty glass spice jar with a name label among full ones, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning a jar at the front held my own name.
scenes.image_prompt: a single spice jar at the front of a rack with a handwritten name label, dim kitchen, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was the only jar that was still completely full.
scenes.image_prompt: one full dark spice jar standing apart from empty ones, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The others, I have learned, empty only after that person is gone.
scenes.image_prompt: a row of empty spice jars with name labels on a dim shelf, long shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
